name: Oatmeal Pie
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Quaker Oats, Uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until foamy.
2. Gradually add sugar and beat until thick.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients; blend well.
4. Pour into the pie shell.
5. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 45 minutes or until the center of the pie is firm.
6. Cool. Serve with sweetened whipped cream, if desired.
